engineering.title: Engineering Services
engineering.subtitle: 20+ Years of Mechanical & Electrical Design Excellence
engineering.intro: JM2 Associates brings two decades of experience designing mechanical and electrical systems for industrial, distribution, institutional, educational, medical, food processing, and commercial facilities.

capabilities.title: HVAC Systems
capabilities.description: Central equipment design, ductwork and piping layouts featuring humidity control, pressurization, refrigeration, and energy-efficient solutions.

capabilities.title: Plumbing Systems
capabilities.description: Complete sizing and detailing, including specialized services like process waste and syphonic roof drainage.

capabilities.title: Electrical Systems
capabilities.description: Power distribution, lighting design, motor controls, and low voltage systems for commercial and industrial facilities.

capabilities.title: Industrial & Process
capabilities.description: Process piping design from conceptual to fabrication-level drawings, plus ventilation, dust collection, and compressed air systems.

capabilities.title: Fire Protection
capabilities.description: Sprinkler system sizing, selection, and layout plus fire alarm integration for comprehensive building protection.

capabilities.title: Energy & LEED
capabilities.description: Energy-efficient retrofits and new construction solutions with LEED certification expertise.

bim.title: BIM Modeling
bim.subtitle: Building Information Modeling for the Modern Age
bim.intro: JM2 has 8+ years of expertise modeling MEP systems for coordination and prefabrication, serving as both lead coordinators and team participants on major projects.

capabilities.title: MEP Coordination
capabilities.description: Full 3D coordination of mechanical, electrical, and plumbing systems to identify and resolve conflicts before construction.

capabilities.title: Prefabrication Support
capabilities.description: Detailed models enabling off-site fabrication of MEP components, reducing field labor and improving quality.

capabilities.title: Energy Analysis
capabilities.description: Building loads analysis, energy calculations, and lifetime cost evaluation for informed decision making.

capabilities.title: Project Scheduling
capabilities.description: 4D BIM integration linking 3D models with construction schedules for visual project planning.

bim.approach: We emphasize detail and installation feasibility, utilizing advanced software to create models that closely match real-world conditions for seamless installation.

scanning.title: 3D Point Cloud Scanning
scanning.subtitle: Precision As-Built Documentation
scanning.intro: Laser scanning technology that rotates 360 degrees to collect 3D location data, creating near-perfect as-built documentation of existing conditions.

capabilities.title: As-Built Documentation
capabilities.description: Capture existing conditions with millimeter accuracy for renovation and retrofit projects.

capabilities.title: Virtual Walkthroughs
capabilities.description: Eliminate reliance on photographs and field measurements with immersive 3D environment exploration.

capabilities.title: Coordination & Sharing
capabilities.description: Share accurate existing conditions with all project stakeholders through integrated BIM workflows.

capabilities.title: Prefabrication Planning
capabilities.description: Enable accurate MEP prefabrication by knowing exact field conditions before manufacturing.

benefits: Creates permanent digital record of facilities
